candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; clearly labeled and has largest positive sales values.
Non-operating; not appropriate for total revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Interest income from assets at amortised cost
candidates.why: Interest income on assets; not total sales.
Duplicative financial income line; not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
A liability, not a revenue flow.

variables.notes: Selected main operating revenue line as top-line sales; other candidates are non-operating or income measures, not revenue.

candidates.why: Total operating expenses including multiple components; too broad for COGS when specific material cost line exists.
Represents direct material input costs, best proxy for cost of goods sold.
Likely overhead/SG&A, not direct COGS.
Includes both production and overhead personnel; less direct than material cost.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Financing result; not COGS.
Financing costs; not COGS.
Other financial expenses; not COGS.
Could be overhead, not core COGS line and appears unused here.
Inventory component, not period expense.

variables.notes: Material cost is the clearest direct production cost line and best represents COGS; total Operating expenses is too broad.

candidates.why: Aggregate of multiple expense types; includes items beyond SG&A such as COGS and D&A.
Likely includes selling, admin, and other overhead expenses; good SG&A component.
Personnel-related overhead (sales, admin, etc.); standard SG&A component when not clearly in COGS.
Balance sheet label, not period expense, and appears unused.

variables.notes: Using the main overhead components (Personnel expenses and Other operating expenses) as SG&A; excluding the total Operating expenses line to avoid mixing in COGS and D&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; not the current-period R&D expense itself.
Explicit current-period research & development expense line.
Capitalized development asset, not period expense.
Balancing entry for development asset; not expense.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit R&D expense line; amortization of capitalized R&D is excluded per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Primary interest expense on financial liabilities; best measure of financing interest cost.
Explicitly non-interest; should not be used for interest expense.
Interest component of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense, likely supplementary to main interest line.
Represents minority interest share of profit, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of interest on lease liabilities; alternative label for lease interest.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense lines: main interest on liabilities, then lease interest, then supplemental lease interest, per guidance to allow label changes over time.

candidates.why: Income attribution, not balance sheet equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Flow measure (comprehensive income), not equity level.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Book equity attributable to the parent shareholders; ideal BE measure excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if owner equity not available.
Technical balancing row, not actual equity figure.
Balancing line with small values; not used for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for total; not BE.
Total balance sheet size; not equity component.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected equity attributable to owners of the parent to exclude non-controlling interests, per BE definition.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to NCI; indicates presence of minorities but BE should use balance sheet amount where available.
Duplicate concept to non-controlling interest on income statement.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow to NCI, not the equity stock.
Balance sheet amount of minority interests; primary MIB measure.
Alternative label for same NCI concept; usable if primary line changes name.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet non-controlling interest, with Minority Interest as an alternate label to handle naming changes.
